jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zepto
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto family as a SEO Specialist in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto:
Zepto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
